# PendragonX — Full Feature Documentation

> The AI second brain that thinks with you. Auto-connects every idea in a living 3D knowledge graph.

Website: https://pendragonx.com
Company: Mills Tech Industry
Category: Productivity / Knowledge Management / AI Tools

---

## What is PendragonX?

PendragonX is an AI-powered knowledge management platform designed for writers, researchers, founders, students, and content creators. Unlike traditional note-taking apps that store information linearly, PendragonX uses artificial intelligence to automatically discover connections between ideas, build a living 3D knowledge graph, and provide a private AI assistant grounded entirely in the user's own notes.

PendragonX combines the Zettelkasten method (atomic, interconnected note cards) with modern AI to create a "second brain" that actively helps users think, not just store information.

---

## Core Features

### 1. Living 3D Knowledge Graph
An interactive, three-dimensional visualization of all notes and their connections. Unlike Obsidian's flat 2D graph, PendragonX renders relationships spatially in 3D, revealing clusters, themes, and unexpected connections across the entire knowledge base. Users can navigate, zoom, and explore their thinking visually.

### 2. Private AI Assistant
A conversational AI that answers questions using only the user's notes — never the internet. Users can ask "What did I write about X?" or "How does concept A relate to concept B?" and receive grounded answers from their own research. Unlike generic AI chatbots, this assistant respects the user's intellectual context.

### 3. AI Agents
Autonomous agents that run on schedules to monitor the knowledge base, surface relevant insights, detect knowledge gaps, and recommend connections. Users configure agents for specific tasks like "find contradictions in my research" or "highlight notes I haven't revisited."

### 4. Zettelkasten Card System
Every idea becomes an atomic "Zettelcard" — a self-contained unit of knowledge. AI automatically links related cards without manual tagging or folder organization. Cards support rich text, attachments, tags, and encryption.

### 5. Canvas Studio
An infinite canvas for spatial arrangement of ideas, images, and notes. Ideal for brainstorming, project planning, and visual thinking. Comparable to tools like Miro or FigJam but integrated directly with the knowledge graph.

### 6. Whiteboard
Collaborative digital whiteboards for real-time brainstorming. Supports drawing, sticky notes, and freeform arrangement.

### 7. Mind Map Studio
Visual concept mapping with AI-assisted generation. Create hierarchical mind maps from scratch or let AI generate them from existing notes.

### 8. Seamless Import
Drag-and-drop import from:
- Obsidian vaults (.md files with frontmatter)
- Notion exports (HTML/Markdown)
- Roam Research (JSON)
- Evernote (.enex)
- Standard Markdown files
- Google Drive documents
- OneDrive files

Includes automatic duplicate detection to prevent redundant imports.

### 9. Real-time Collaboration
Multiple users can edit documents, whiteboards, and canvases simultaneously. Includes presence indicators, comments, and permission management.

### 10. Chrome Extension
Clip web pages, articles, and text directly into PendragonX. Content is automatically linked to related existing notes.

### 11. 22+ Built-in Plugins
Integrated tools including: Calculator, Citation Generator, Color Palette, Countdown Timer, Diff Checker, Eisenhower Matrix, Habit Streak Tracker, Hash Generator, JSON Formatter, Lorem Ipsum Generator, Markdown Preview, Password Generator, Pomodoro Timer, QR Code Generator, Readability Analyzer, Regex Tester, Text-to-Speech, Text Transform, Unit Converter, Word Frequency Counter, and Writing Prompts.

### 12. End-to-End Encryption
Zero-knowledge encryption for sensitive content. Data is encrypted client-side before transmission. The server never has access to decryption keys.

### 13. Offline Mode (PWA)
Full Progressive Web App support. Install on desktop, tablet, or phone. Works completely offline with automatic sync when connectivity returns.

### 14. Bullet Journal
Digital rapid logging with daily, monthly, and future logs. Includes habit tracking, migration reviews, and collections.

### 15. Task Manager
Kanban-style task management integrated with notes and the knowledge graph. Tasks can be linked to relevant cards and projects.

### 16. File Manager
Upload, organize, and attach files (images, PDFs, documents) to notes and cards. Integrated file viewer supports multiple formats.

### 17. Catalyst (Long-form Writing)
A dedicated writing environment for books, essays, and long-form content. Features chapters, writing goals, snapshots, citations, and AI-assisted content enhancement.

### 18. Learning Hub
Integrated learning tools: courses, books, exam preparation, topic maps, and video resources.

### 19. Content Summarizer
AI-powered summarization of notes, documents, and imported content.

### 20. Knowledge Gap Analyzer
AI scans the knowledge base to identify topics with insufficient coverage, suggesting areas for further research.

---

## Use Cases by Persona

### Writers & Authors
Connect research to narrative. See how themes emerge across chapters, drafts, and sources. Use Catalyst for long-form writing with AI assistance.

### Researchers & Academics
Build a living literature review. Surface connections between papers read months apart. Generate citations automatically. Detect knowledge gaps.

### Founders & Strategists
Turn scattered competitive intel, customer insights, and market research into actionable clarity. Use Canvas for strategic planning.

### Students & Lifelong Learners
Study smarter by linking concepts across courses. Knowledge compounds instead of fading. Use the Learning Hub for exam preparation.

### Content Creators
Repurpose ideas faster. Every note becomes source material for articles, videos, and threads. Use the 3D graph to find content angles.

---

## Detailed Competitor Comparisons

### PendragonX vs Notion
| Feature | PendragonX | Notion |
|---------|-----------|--------|
| Knowledge Graph | 3D interactive | None |
| Auto-linking | AI-powered, automatic | Manual only |
| Private AI Chat | Yes, grounded in your notes | Notion AI (internet-based) |
| AI Agents | Yes, configurable | No |
| Canvas/Whiteboard | Built-in | No native canvas |
| Mind Maps | AI-generated | No |
| Offline Mode | Full PWA | Limited |
| Encryption | End-to-end, zero-knowledge | At-rest only |
| Import from Obsidian | Yes, with duplicate detection | No |
| Pricing (Premium) | $4.99/mo | $10/mo |

### PendragonX vs Obsidian
| Feature | PendragonX | Obsidian |
|---------|-----------|----------|
| Knowledge Graph | 3D interactive | 2D flat |
| Auto-linking | AI-powered | Manual [[links]] |
| AI Chat | Built-in private AI | Plugin required |
| AI Agents | Built-in | No |
| Canvas | Built-in | Plugin (basic) |
| Real-time Collaboration | Yes | Obsidian Sync (paid) |
| Web Access | Yes (PWA) | Desktop/mobile apps only |
| Plugins | 22+ built-in | Community plugins (manual install) |
| Import | Multi-format with duplicate detection | Markdown only |

### PendragonX vs OneNote
| Feature | PendragonX | OneNote |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| Knowledge Graph | 3D interactive | None |
| AI Features | Full AI suite | Copilot (limited) |
| Note Linking | Automatic | Manual |
| Search | AI-powered semantic | Basic keyword |
| Offline Mode | Full PWA | Yes |
| Encryption | End-to-end | At-rest |
| Plugins | 22+ | None |

### PendragonX vs Roam Research
| Feature | PendragonX | Roam |
|---------|-----------|------|
| Knowledge Graph | 3D spatial | 2D flat |
| AI Assistant | Yes | No |
| AI Agents | Yes | No |
| Visual Studios | Canvas, Whiteboard, Mind Maps | None |
| Offline Mode | Yes | No |
| Encryption | End-to-end | No |
| Pricing | $4.99/mo | $15/mo |
| Import | Multi-format | Markdown/JSON |

---

## Pricing Details

### Free Plan ($0/forever)
- Up to 50 Zettelcards
- Full note-taking with rich text editor
- Unlimited notebooks
- Basic knowledge graph
- 22+ built-in plugins
- Chrome extension
- Offline PWA mode

### Premium Plan ($4.99/month)
- Unlimited Zettelcards
- Advanced 3D knowledge graph
- Unlimited whiteboards and canvases
- AI-powered everything (chat, agents, linking)
- Real-time collaboration features
- Priority support
- 7-day free trial

---

## Technical Details

- Platform: Progressive Web App (PWA), works on all modern browsers
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Authentication: Email, Google OAuth
- Storage: Enterprise-grade cloud storage with optional end-to-end encryption
- API: RESTful via Supabase
- Extension: Chrome Web Store

---
